title: Incorrect column name in OR condition of LEFT JOIN crashes mserver
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT CHECK(value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table1 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (ref_id INTEGER, description LONG VARCHAR);
SELECT T1.name, T2.description FROM test_table1 T1 LEFT JOIN test_table2 T2 ON (T1.id = T2.ref_id OR T1.value = CAST(T2.ref_id AS FLOAT));
key_bug_features: Incorrect column name in LEFT JOIN condition
